tests.name: complete local quality gate
tests.summary: Module verification, vet, unit tests, race tests, reproducible linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 builds, daemon, MCP and worker smoke tests, 51 Python tests, and repository validation passed after the final review fixes.

tests.summary: The final reviewed PR tree passed repository quality, PostgreSQL durability, rollback, durable restart, and the clean observability-stack rehearsal.

tests.name: exact final public implementation workflow
tests.summary: The exact squash-merged public implementation passed the complete protected workflow on a clean Linux host.

tests.name: real two-plane artifact restore rehearsal
tests.summary: Three canonical artifacts were restored into an isolated PostgreSQL database and a separate versioned MinIO data directory; physical source and restored inventories matched exactly and every body passed API readback verification.

tests.name: Sprint 06 rollback target rehearsal
